title: Vijaya Hospital | Multispecialty Hospital | Bangalore | Vijaya Hospital
description: Vijaya Hospital understands that your well-being plays a vital role, and we are dedicated to providing you with expert medical services and compassionate care.
text:
Vijaya Hospital | Multispecialty Hospital | Bangalore | Vijaya Hospital Hello and Welcome to Vijaya Hospital! 24*7 AMBULANCE BOOK AN APPOINTMENT CONTACT About Specialities Events Doctors Facilities Need Help? Every day, 24 hours Send a Message! The quickest way to get in contact is to telephone (+91)9448308729 Name Email Contact MessageText Send a Message I have read and accept the Privacy Policy Caring for Your Health, Always with Heart We offer a wide range of medical and
                healthcare Services. Call: (+91)9448308729 Upcoming Events Join us for our Free Medical Screening & Blood Donation Camp on 7th December 2024 . Together, let’s make a difference. View Event Details Book An Appointment Find A Doctor Centers of Excellence Our Devotion shows in the comprehensive care we provide for
                our patients. All of us at Vijaya Hospital are committed to our
                mission: To Help You Live Your Healthiest Life. Anaesthesiology The Department of Anaesthesiology focuses on patient management, developing anaesthetic regimens, and administering anaesthetics to relieve patients' pain and distress. Nephrology The Nephrology department provides care to patients suffering from acute and chronic kidney diseases. Radiology The Department of Radiology provides MRI, PET CT, Ultrasound, Sonography, Colour Doppler, CT, Dexa, Mammography, intervention procedures,  and X-Rays. Facilities We offer the most advanced and effective bespoke treatment packages to suit your needs 24 * 7 Emergency Services Modern operation Theaters Minimal Access Laparoscopy Surgery Massage ECG More OUR TEAM OF HIGHLY TRAINED DOCTORS Specialists " No matter what your concern, your first stop is one of our accessible, expert health professionals." PLEASE READ THROUGH THEIR PROFILES TO LEARN MORE. Get To Know Our Doctors Dr Somashekhar Cardiologist Dr Uma M Cardiologist Dr Basavraju K M General Surgeon Dr Santosh M P General Surgeon Need Some Advice From Our Experts? Enter Feedback/
